channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: MotoGP postpones Qatar Grand Prix due to Middle East conflict
item.description: The Qatar GP, scheduled for April 10-12, has been rescheduled for November 8 amid the ongoing US-Israeli war on Iran.

item.title: Activists rally outside White House against war with Iran
item.description: Activists rally outside White House against war with Iran

item.title: Al-Quds Day rally in Toronto calls for an end to the war in Iran & Lebanon
item.description: Demonstrators gathered in Toronto for Al-Quds Day, denouncing US-Israeli attacks on Iran and Lebanon.

item.title: Minab: When the world’s most precise missile chose a classroom
item.description: Targeting a school and the mass killing of children are war crimes, and those responsible need to be held to account.

item.title: Anti-war protest held in Tel Aviv, criticising Israel’s attacks on Iran
item.description: A small anti-war protest was held in Tel Aviv, criticising Israel’s attacks on Iran.

item.title: Medvedev ends Alcaraz’s winning run, sets up Sinner final at Indian Wells
item.description: Medvedev, who arrived in the US after leaving the UAE via Oman amid Iranian attacks. ends the world no 1's 16-match run.

item.title: Cars were burned and overturned by shrapnel in Tel Aviv district
item.description: Cars were seen burned and one overturned in in Tel Aviv district caused by shrapnel after a wave of Iranian missiles.

item.title: FPV drone slams into US military base in Iraq
item.description: Iraq's Iranian-backed Kataib Hezbollah has released drone video from an attack on the US's Victory Base in Baghdad.

item.title: Funeral procession for influential Iranian defence chief
item.description: Iran has held a funeral for the country's most influential defence figure, Ali Shamkhani.

item.title: Barrage of US-Israeli strikes target Isfahan
item.description: A US-Israeli strike on a factory in Isfahan has killed least 15 people, according to Iranian media.
